headline: Global Waste Management Market Expansion Aids WCN Amid Low Liquidity
summary: Waste Connections benefits from waste market growth, customer expansion and rising efficiency, but seasonality, competition and liquidity risks persist.

headline: Sustained Revenue Growth Aids Equifax Amid Low Liquidity
summary: EFX benefits from strong demand, product innovation and a diverse client base, but cybersecurity, seasonality and liquidity remain concerns.
